scripts.build: pnpm --recursive --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --recursive --filter './apps/*' run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --recursive --filter './packages/*' run typecheck && pnpm --filter @violin-erp/admin exec next typegen && pnpm --filter @violin-erp/admin exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @violin-erp/miniapp exec tsc --noEmit
